name: vehicle-import-platform
description: JSL Imports — the definitive Japan→Sri Lanka vehicle import platform

scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/calc-engine run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run build
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run api:typecheck && npm run api:build && npm run api:e2e
